description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the busybox:latest Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a job named build in the build stage that runs the exact shell commands: rm -f ./target, ./create-tar.sh, mkdir -p ./target, and mv *.tar.gz ./target/. Configure the job to publish the target/ directory as an artifact named after the job ($CI_JOB_NAME). No caches, services, variables, or special rules are required.
